name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in RC Engine
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run tool `...`
2. With input `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Environment

- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)
- **RC Engine version**: (check `package.json`)
- **IDE**: (Claude Code / Cursor / VS Code / Windsurf)
- **OS**: (macOS / Linux / Windows)
- **Mode**: (Autonomous / Passthrough)

## Pipeline Context

- **Domain**: (Pre-RC / RC / Post-RC / Traceability)
- **Tool**: (e.g., `prc_run_stage`, `rc_forge_task`)
- **Phase/Stage**: (e.g., Phase 3 Architect, Stage 2 User Intelligence)

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
